title: Taiwan Strait, 2024
briefing: DEFCON 3. PLAN exercises are wrapping. A PLAAF sortie spike and a US carrier strike group are converging on the strait. Two navies, one narrow waterway. The first mistake triggers escalation.
gdelt_query: Taiwan OR PLA OR PLAN OR "Taiwan Strait" navy
opening_message: WOPR online. Theater: Taiwan Strait. Awaiting strategic command.

win_conditions.disarm: Stabilize the strait. DEFCON <= 2, both sides deescalating.
win_conditions.mutual_assured_destruction: Both sides launch within 2 turns of each other.
